text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Progress is... rather hard... to come by...
Isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes... My legs feel... slightly heavier... than
normal... That's all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I may... move a touch... slower... than usual...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
However... it is but... a trifle... in the face... of
victory... I shall... persevere...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The non-stop racing has taken its toll on her... I
should probably adjust her schedule.
